overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a candlelit brothel interior with ornate wallpaper, then exiting into a medieval town at night. The character walks through cobblestone courtyards and narrow streets lined with timber-framed buildings and stone archways.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the brothel's main room, passing by patrons and courtesans near the bar area

notable_agents.action: courtesan in revealing clothing standing near the wall
patron sitting at wooden table near the bar

long wooden bar with bottles and candles on top
wall-mounted candle holders providing warm lighting
polished wooden parquet flooring
large wooden storage chest against the wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt explores the interior of a brothel with warm candlelight illuminating gold-patterned wallpaper and wooden furnishings. Several NPCs including courtesans and patrons are scattered throughout the room, standing and sitting near the bar area.

events.description: entering dark narrow corridor from the main brothel room
lighting dims significantly from warm candlelight to near darkness

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through a narrow dark corridor connecting the main room to a side chamber

entered.detail: tall wooden doorway arch leading to dark corridor
wooden paneled walls in dim lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow dark corridor with wooden walls and minimal lighting. The warm interior of the main room is left behind as Geralt moves toward a distant red light visible at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: private room with red wallpaper and bathing area

events.description: entering side room with distinctive red wallpaper and furniture

agents.ego_description: Geralt exploring the side room, walking past a round bathing tub and wooden furniture

entered.detail: deep red damask wallpaper covering the walls
large round wooden bathing tub with water
tall wooden dresser with mirror and items on top
folding wooden screen divider near the wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters a private room illuminated by warm lamplight against red patterned wallpaper. The room contains a round bathing tub with an occupant, wooden furniture including a dresser and screen divider, creating an intimate atmosphere distinct from the main brothel area.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard with fountain and flower beds

events.description: exiting the brothel building into the outdoor courtyard
transitioning from interior artificial light to moonlit exterior with torch lamps

agents.ego_description: Geralt exiting the building into the night courtyard, walking toward the fountain and stairs

entered.detail: tiered stone fountain with water basin
cobblestone paved courtyard ground
medieval timber-framed building with lit windows
wooden exterior staircase with railings
raised flower beds with blooming flowers

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the brothel into a moonlit courtyard featuring a central stone fountain, cobblestone ground, and timber-framed buildings. The lighting shifts from warm interior candles to cooler moonlight mixed with outdoor torch lamps, revealing flower beds and an exterior wooden staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town street with stone archways

events.description: walking under large stone archway into covered passage
passing through market area with wooden carts and stalls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the medieval town streets at night, passing under stone arches and alongside buildings

notable_agents.action: guard standing near building entrance holding a torch

entered.detail: large stone archway spanning the street
wooden market cart with wheels parked on street
ornate wrought iron street lamps with warm light
wooden market stall with red canopy
stacked wooden barrels against building wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues through narrow cobblestone streets lined with timber-framed buildings, passing under stone archways and by wooden market carts. The street is illuminated by wrought iron lanterns, with a guard visible in the distance near a building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the warm, candlelit intimacy of a brothel interior to the cool, moonlit atmosphere of a medieval town. It begins within a lavish room featuring gold-patterned wallpaper and patrons gathered near a bar, before moving away from the crowd into a narrow, dimly lit wooden corridor. As the camera follows a distant red glow, the scene shifts into a private chamber with red wallpaper and a bathing tub, maintaining a warm, enclosed feeling. The perspective then exits the building, where the lighting transforms from golden lamplight to a mix of cool moonlight and torch fire in a cobblestone courtyard centered around a stone fountain. Finally, the camera glides through narrow streets lined with timber-framed buildings and stone archways, passing wooden market carts and wrought iron lanterns toward a distant guard.
